name: QA 1483
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1483

look for bad syslog entries



Copyright (c) 2024 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py fedora39-container reproduce

look for bad syslog entries

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1483.out.bad)
17a18,27
> Oct 22 19:28:16 31020f32444e rc[709443]: pmpost: cannot open or create file "/var/log/pcp/NOTICES": Permission denied
> Oct 22 19:28:16 31020f32444e rc[709443]: pmpost: unposted message: [Tue Oct 22 19:28:16 2024] stop pmlogger from /etc/pcp/pmlogger/rc

> Oct 22 19:29:21 31020f32444e rc[715889]: pmpost: cannot open or create file "/var/log/pcp/NOTICES": Permission denied

Check local PMCD is still alive ...
